description: Players ranked by elapsed time. Fastest time wins (ASC). Best single performance kept across attempts.

scoring_config.notes: Lower time = better rank. Aggregation: MIN across rounds (best attempt wins).

config_notes: No 1v1 matches — all players compete simultaneously in each round
Measurement unit: seconds (default), minutes also supported
Suitable for: sprints, obstacle courses, timed drills, reaction time challenges
